hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */capabilities/default.json|*/Cargo.lock|*/bun.lock|*/gen/*) echo 'BLOCKED: This file should not be edited directly.' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; exit 0
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'src-tauri/.*\.rs$'; then cd /Users/sloveless/Development/projects/kamerz/src-tauri && cargo check --message-format=short 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
